stories.title: Project scaffold - Next.js 14+ App Router, TypeScript, ESLint, Tailwind CSS, dependencies
AI provider abstraction layer - AIProvider interface, Gemini 2.5 Flash, retry logic
Prompt enrichment engine - archetype detection, gap analysis, flavor seeds, starters
Theme.json generation with light and dark mode - structured JSON, Zod validation
Template and part generation - block markup via focused Gemini calls
Pattern generation - 4-6 patterns per archetype, PHP format, creative variation
Block markup validation and design audit - WCAG, typography, spacing, score
ZIP packaging and theme assembly - WordPress structure, JSZip, downloadable blob
Frontend UI - input form, suggestions, progress, audit results, download
WordPress Playground live preview - iframe embed, Blueprint installTheme
Tests - unit tests for validation, schema, audit, packaging, e2e integration
Documentation - README, ADR, What I'd Do Next
